name: Gaumont SA
summary: Gaumont SA, together with its subsidiaries, produces and distributes movies in France, the United States, and internationally. The company operates in two segments, Movie Production and Distribution, and Television Production and Distribution. The company produces and distributes animated feature films, and cartoon and drama series. It sells broadcasting rights to television channels; and distributes video and video on demand. The company is based in Neuilly-sur-Seine, France.
